_kommentar: Ljudeffekter genererade med ElevenLabs /v1/sound-generation. Omgenerera: POST med {text, duration_seconds, prompt_influence: 0.4}, bädda in som <audio id="nobel-sfx-NAMN"> — NobelSound.play() hittar dem automatiskt, syntesen är fallback.

sfx_explosion.text: Massive dynamite explosion with deep rumbling boom, debris falling, 1860s quarry blast

sfx_kattMjau.text: single cute friendly cat meow, soft and playful, high pitched kitten

sfx_confetti.text: short celebratory fanfare with party horn and children cheering happily, festive and warm

sfx_minigameCorrect.text: short bright success chime, sparkly magical ding, playful and rewarding

sfx_minigameComplete.text: triumphant short victory jingle with warm bells, game level complete, joyful

sfx_minigameWrong.text: soft gentle cartoon boing, kind playful error sound, not scary

sfx_newspaper.text: newspaper page rustling and unfolding, crisp paper sounds

sfx_penWrite.text: quill pen writing on parchment paper, scratchy ink strokes, 19th century
